summary: Mixed‑quality recording of a solid show with a standout acoustic set and strong renditions of Black Peter and Music Never Stopped.
review: Fans describe the performance as generally good – high‑energy electric numbers, an especially praised acoustic set, and memorable versions of Black Peter and Music Never Stopped. Recording quality isn’t discussed in detail; one reviewer points to a separate soundboard version, implying this source may be audience or matrix with only fair fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated positively by most reviewers (5 and 4 stars) while recording comments are vague, leading to a solid but not outstanding overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific audio comments; one reviewer suggests a soundboard version exists elsewhere, hinting this may be an audience/matrix capture with average clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The acoustic set is highlighted as the best part of the night, while electric sets receive mixed feedback – some find them high‑energy and comparable to 1977 shows, others call them mediocre.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for being 'on' during the electric set and noted as his favorite on Black Peter.
